parsed.production_notes: The video is a screencast of an app interface featuring static profile pictures and digital UI elements. The voiceover sounds like AI-generated text-to-speech, and there is no live-action footage.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman, early 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair and a bright smile.
Young Indian man, early 20s, slim build, fair complexion. He has short, dark, messy hair and a subtle smile.
Voice only. No physical appearance visible.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface, purple gradient background

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid purple gradient background. In the upper center, two circular portrait photographs are displayed side-by-side. The left photo features Character A, a young woman smiling in a natural outdoor setting. The right photo features Character B, a young man with a subtle smile. The rest of the space is a blank gradient.

scenes.visual_description: An app interface showing an active audio call. The background is a purple gradient. Two circular profile pictures of Character A and Character B are displayed side-by-side. Below them is a green bar indicating practice time, and a countdown timer. At the bottom, there are three circular buttons for Mute, Speaker, and End call. A recording indicator appears at the top midway through.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: நீங்க இத ஆரம்பிச்சு எத்தன நாள் ஆச்சு? [How many days has it been since you started this?]

Character B says: ஒரு 10 முதல் 12 நாள் இருக்கும். [It's been about 10 to 12 days.]

Character A says: அப்போ இப்போ ஏதாச்சும் மாற்றம் தெரியுதா? [So, do you see any change now?]

Character B says: ஆமா, I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I speak English very confidently now.]

Character A says: ஓஹோ, இப்போ சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுறீங்களே. [Oh, you are speaking English superbly now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments
Rani
Akash
practices for an average of 6 minutes/call
28:13 minutes remaining for today's call
Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience
Mute
Speaker
End

scenes.setting: Digital app store interface, white background

panels.panel_visual_description: A plain white background representing a digital interface. In the upper left, there is a placeholder for a square icon. Below, a rectangular video thumbnail shows a young woman with dark hair speaking. The overall composition is clean and structured, typical of a digital storefront.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the Google Play Store page for the 'MySivi AI' app. The screen shows the app icon, title, and a '10M+ Downloads' highlight. An 'Install' button is clicked, changing to an 'Installing...' state. Below, a promotional video thumbnail features a woman speaking, alongside text describing the app's features.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: MySivi மூலமா, ஒரு கோடிக்கும் மேலானவங்க ஒருத்தரோடு ஒருத்தர் பேசி Spoken English practice பண்றாங்க. [Through MySivi, over one crore people practice Spoken English by talking to each other.]

Character C says: நீங்களும் இன்னைக்கே ஆரம்பிங்க. [You too start today.]
scenes.on_screen_text:

scenes.setting: Digital promotional screen, dark blue background

panels.panel_visual_description: A dark blue background featuring a glowing, circular 3D pedestal in the center. The pedestal is illuminated by soft blue spotlights from above and below, creating a premium, stage-like atmosphere. The surrounding space is dark and empty, focusing attention on the central glowing platform.

scenes.visual_description: A promotional screen for 'MySivi Premium'. The background is dark blue with a glowing pedestal in the center displaying a large '₹1'. Above it, a banner reads 'LIMITED TIME OFFER'. Below the pedestal, text indicates 'Autopay, cancel anytime' and '1,200 learners purchased today'. Three feature boxes at the bottom highlight '24/7 AI English Teacher', '500+ Exercises and Lessons', and 'Unlimited Access'.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: Trial வெறும் ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு மட்டும்தான். [Trial is for just one rupee only.]
